case_title: AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY VS. EOGHAN CONSTRUCTION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $350.00 FILED BY AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT EOGHAN CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $100.00 SERVED APR-04-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EOGHAN CONSTRUCTION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2012 - JUDGMENT. PANFILO ARMAS APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EOGHAN CONSTRUCTION $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $480.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
